items.title: Gubernatorial Candidate John James Received Over $100,000 From Data Center Builders While Criticizing Projects
items.dek: Campaign finance records show Republican John James accepted at least $107,300 from Walbridge executives and family members tied to major Michigan data center projects, including the Saline Township campus, even as he attacks rivals on the issue.

items.title: Dowagiac Residents Report Persistent Noise From Nearby Data Center Disrupting Daily Life
items.dek: A Michigan couple living near a data center in Dowagiac says constant high-pitched humming has made sleeping and relaxing difficult, with noise levels rising over time according to their measurements.

items.title: U.S. Data Center Power Demand Surges as Tech Giants Accelerate AI Infrastructure Buildout
items.dek: National reports highlight accelerating data center construction nationwide driven by AI, with utilities warning of grid strain and rising electricity costs in multiple states beyond Michigan.
